pull.title: [30.x] Partial backport #34650
pull.body: This PR backports commits from https://github.com/bitcoin/bitcoin/pull/34650 not related to Qt update. They fix issues when building with GCC 16 and improves Qt detecting.

cmake: Fix `FindQt` module

The `find_package(Qt .. MODULE REQUIRED COMPONENTS ...)` call must treat
any missing component as a fatal error.

Github-Pull: #34650
Rebased-From: c55584575a99ff565131207916eccb3223e508a3

events.message:
cmake: Fix `FindQt` module

The `find_package(Qt .. MODULE REQUIRED COMPONENTS ...)` call must treat
any missing component as a fatal error.
